stages.logText: I have been accepted into the Iron Hall as an Initiate.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Apprentice in the Iron Hall.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Adept in the Iron Hall.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Journeyman in the Iron Hall.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Veteran in the Iron Hall.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Elder in the Iron Hall.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Grandmaster in the Iron Hall.
I have completed the master trial of the Iron Hall. Aldric the Ironclad has named me a true master of the order.
I have been accepted into the Shadow Lodge as an Initiate.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Apprentice in the Shadow Lodge.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Adept in the Shadow Lodge.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Journeyman in the Shadow Lodge.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Veteran in the Shadow Lodge.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Elder in the Shadow Lodge.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Grandmaster in the Shadow Lodge.
I have completed the master trial of the Shadow Lodge. Vespera the Quiet has named me a true master of the order.
I have been accepted into the Sun Sanctum as an Initiate.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Apprentice in the Sun Sanctum.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Adept in the Sun Sanctum.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Journeyman in the Sun Sanctum.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Veteran in the Sun Sanctum.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Elder in the Sun Sanctum.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Grandmaster in the Sun Sanctum.
I have completed the master trial of the Sun Sanctum. Father Caelan has named me a true master of the order.
I have been accepted into the Verdant Circle as an Initiate.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Apprentice in the Verdant Circle.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Adept in the Verdant Circle.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Journeyman in the Verdant Circle.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Veteran in the Verdant Circle.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Elder in the Verdant Circle.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Grandmaster in the Verdant Circle.
I have completed the master trial of the Verdant Circle. Mother Briar has named me a true master of the order.
I have been accepted into the Arcanum Spire as an Initiate.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Apprentice in the Arcanum Spire.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Adept in the Arcanum Spire.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Journeyman in the Arcanum Spire.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Veteran in the Arcanum Spire.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Elder in the Arcanum Spire.
I have proven myself worthy of the rank of Grandmaster in the Arcanum Spire.
I have completed the master trial of the Arcanum Spire. Magister Vorell has named me a true master of the order.
